title: Anno Interviews
wikitext:
[]: Anno Interviews             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sun Jun 28, 2009 4:37 pm has there been any interviews with anno or anno and co about rebuild recently?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 28, 2009 6:58 pm There were some seiyuu interview things (also Hikaru Utada and Shiro Sagisu I think) in the Entry File 1 book about 1.0. Dunno about the rest of the staff.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Jun 28, 2009 10:53 pm Tsurumaki interview in the theatrical program. but I don't have a scanner, and it looks like a lot of it is talking about CG.

[]:             Quote Post by thedarkorb » Mon Jun 29, 2009 12:34 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: There were some seiyuu interview things (also Hikaru Utada and Shiro Sagisu I think) in the Entry File 1 book about 1.0. Dunno about the rest of the staff.
